---
title: "RAG_analyse_thesis"
author: "Ilse Hamers"
date: "2026-06-02"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# readme
This script analyses the castor output for RAG on gold vs historic data.

## Libraries
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(irr)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(ordinal)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(readxl)
```

# Data
```{r}
data_dir <- Sys.getenv("ANEMIA_DATA_DIR", unset = "data")
pad_workbook    <- file.path(data_dir,"CASTOR\\CASTOR_export_compleet.xlsx")
pad_mapping_pe  <- file.path(data_dir,"CASTOR\\castor_survey_Prompt_Engineering_Beoordeling_mapping.csv")
pad_mapping_rag <- file.path(data_dir,"CASTOR\\castor_survey_RAG_Beoordeling_mapping.csv")
```

## Zero-shot baseline from Prompt Engineering
```{r}
df_pe_wide <- read_excel(pad_workbook, sheet = "Prompt_Engineering_Beoordeling")

df_pe_wide <- df_pe_wide %>%
  mutate(beoordelaar = case_when(
    `Castor Participant ID` == 110006 ~ "B2",
    `Castor Participant ID` == 110007 ~ "B1",
    `Castor Participant ID` == 110008 ~ "B3"
  )) %>%
  select(-`Castor Participant ID`)

df_map_pe <- read.csv(pad_mapping_pe)

df_map_pe <- df_map_pe %>%
  mutate(
    UniekLabnummer = str_extract(bestandsnaam, "^\\d+"),
    methode        = str_extract(bestandsnaam, "(zero|one|three)shot"),
    model          = str_extract(bestandsnaam, "(medgemma4b|medgemma27b|phi4)")
  ) %>%
  select(-bestandsnaam)

score_cols_pe <- names(df_pe_wide)[str_detect(names(df_pe_wide), "^prompt_engineering")]

df_pe_lang <- df_pe_wide %>%
  select(beoordelaar, all_of(score_cols_pe)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols      = all_of(score_cols_pe),
    names_to  = "variabele",
    values_to = "score"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    casus_nr = str_extract(variabele, "casus\\d+"),
    factor   = str_extract(variabele, "[^_]+$")
  ) %>%
  select(beoordelaar, casus_nr, factor, score) %>%
  left_join(df_map_pe, by = "casus_nr") %>%
  filter(methode == "zeroshot") %>%   # alleen zero-shot als baseline
  mutate(methode = "Zero-shot")
```

## RAG data
```{r}
df_rag_wide <- read_excel(pad_workbook, sheet = "RAG_Beoordeling")

df_rag_wide <- df_rag_wide %>%
  mutate(beoordelaar = case_when(
    `Castor Participant ID` == 110006 ~ "B2",
    `Castor Participant ID` == 110007 ~ "B1",
    `Castor Participant ID` == 110008 ~ "B3"
  )) %>%
  select(-`Castor Participant ID`)

df_map_rag <- read.csv(pad_mapping_rag)

df_map_rag <- df_map_rag %>%
  mutate(
    UniekLabnummer = str_extract(bestandsnaam, "^\\d+"),
    methode        = case_when(
      str_detect(bestandsnaam, "_hist") ~ "hist",
      str_detect(bestandsnaam, "_goud") ~ "goud"
    ),
    model          = str_extract(bestandsnaam, "(medgemma4b|medgemma27b|phi4)")
  ) %>%
  select(-bestandsnaam)

score_cols_rag <- names(df_rag_wide)[str_detect(names(df_rag_wide), "^rag_beoordeling")]

df_rag_lang <- df_rag_wide %>%
  select(beoordelaar, all_of(score_cols_rag)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols      = all_of(score_cols_rag),
    names_to  = "variabele",
    values_to = "score"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    casus_nr = str_extract(variabele, "casus\\d+"),
    factor   = str_extract(variabele, "[^_]+$")
  ) %>%
  select(beoordelaar, casus_nr, factor, score) %>%
  left_join(df_map_rag, by = "casus_nr")
```

## Merge into one and create neater labels
```{r}
df_lang <- bind_rows(df_pe_lang, df_rag_lang) %>%
  mutate(
    model = case_when(
      model == "medgemma4b" ~ "MedGemma 4B",
      model == "medgemma27b" ~ "MedGemma 27B",
      model == "phi4" ~ "Phi-4 14B"
    ),
    methode = case_when(
      methode == "Zero-shot" ~ "Zero-shot",
      methode == "hist" ~ "RAG (historic)",
      methode == "goud" ~ "RAG (gold standard)"
    ),
    factor = case_when(
      factor == "correctheid" ~ "Clinical correctness",
      factor == "nuance" ~ "Nuance",
      factor == "databasering" ~ "Hallucination",
      factor == "format" ~ "Format",
      factor == "taalgebruik" ~ "Language"
    )
  )

factor_volgorde  <- c("Clinical correctness", "Nuance", "Hallucination", "Format", "Language")
methode_volgorde <- c("Zero-shot", "RAG (historic)", "RAG (gold standard)")

df_lang <- df_lang %>%
  mutate(
    factor  = factor(factor,  levels = factor_volgorde),
    model   = factor(model,   levels = c("MedGemma 4B", "MedGemma 27B", "Phi-4 14B")),
    methode = factor(methode, levels = methode_volgorde)
  )

print(table(df_lang$model, df_lang$methode))

df_lang <- df_lang %>%
  mutate(score = as.integer(score))
```

## ICC
```{r}
icc_per_factor <- map_dfr(factoren, function(f) {

  mat_f <- df_lang %>%
    filter(factor == f) %>%
    mutate(item_id = paste(UniekLabnummer, model, methode, sep = "_")) %>%
    select(beoordelaar, item_id, score) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = beoordelaar, values_from = score) %>%
    select(B1, B2, B3)

  res_single <- icc(mat_f, model = "twoway", type = "agreement", unit = "single")
  res_avg    <- icc(mat_f, model = "twoway", type = "agreement", unit = "average")

  tibble(
    factor = f,
    ICC_single = round(res_single$value, 3),
    ICC_avg = round(res_avg$value, 3),
    lower_single = round(res_single$lbound, 3),
    upper_single = round(res_single$ubound, 3),
    lower_avg = round(res_avg$lbound, 3),
    upper_avg = round(res_avg$ubound, 3)
  )
})

print(icc_per_factor)
```

# Boxplots per factor: not used in thesis!
```{r}
model_kleuren <- c(
  "MedGemma 4B"  = "#e08282",
  "MedGemma 27B" = "#bc4242",
  "Phi-4 14B"    = "#2c3e50"
)

for (f in factoren) {
  df_sub <- df_lang %>% filter(factor == f)

  p <- ggplot(df_sub, aes(x = methode, y = score, fill = model)) +
    geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.9, outlier.size = 1.5, position = position_dodge(0.8)) +
    stat_summary(
      aes(group = model),
      fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 23, size = 2,
      fill = "white", position = position_dodge(0.8)
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Scores per methode en model voor:", f),
      x = "Methode", y = "Score", fill = "LLM Model"
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = model_kleuren) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, hjust = 0.5),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      axis.title       = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position  = "bottom",
      axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 15, hjust = 1)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = 1:5)

  print(p)
}
```

# boxplot cumulative scores
```{r}

p_totaal <- ggplot(df_totaal, aes(x = methode, y = totaalscore, fill = model)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(alpha = methode), outlier.size = 1.5, position = position_dodge(0.8)) +
  
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1.5, linetype = "dashed", color = 'gray') +
  
  stat_summary(
    aes(group = model),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 23, size = 2,
    fill = "white", position = position_dodge(0.8)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Total cumulative score — RAG vs. Zero-shot baseline",
    x = "Method", y = "Total Score", fill = "Model"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = model_kleuren) +
  
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("Zero-shot" = 0.5, "RAG (historic)" = 0.9, "RAG (gold standard)" = 0.9), guide = "none") + 
  
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, hjust = 0.5),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.title       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 15, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, max(df_totaal$totaalscore, na.rm = TRUE), by = 2))

print(p_totaal)
```

# Statistics
## CLMM per factor
```{r}
clmm_resultaten <- list()

for (f in factoren) {
  df_sub <- df_lang %>%
    filter(factor == f) %>%
    mutate(score = factor(score, ordered = TRUE))

  cat("\n", strrep("=", 60), "\n")
  cat("Factor:", f, "\n")
  cat(strrep("=", 60), "\n")

  model <- clmm(
    score ~ model + methode + (1 | UniekLabnummer) + (1 | beoordelaar),
    data = df_sub,
    link = "logit"
  )

  clmm_resultaten[[f]] <- model
  print(summary(model))
}
```

## LMM cumulative score
```{r}
df_totaal_lmm <- df_lang %>%
  group_by(beoordelaar, casus_nr, UniekLabnummer, model, methode) %>%
  summarise(totaalscore = sum(score, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

model_totaal_lmm <- lmer(
  totaalscore ~ model + methode + (1 | UniekLabnummer) + (1 | beoordelaar),
  data = df_totaal_lmm
)

summary(model_totaal_lmm)

par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
plot(fitted(model_totaal_lmm), resid(model_totaal_lmm),
     xlab = "Fitted", ylab = "Residuals", main = "Residuals vs Fitted")
abline(h = 0, col = "red", lty = 2)
qqnorm(resid(model_totaal_lmm), main = "Q-Q plot residuals")
qqline(resid(model_totaal_lmm), col = "red")
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
```

## Post-hoc (EMMeans) per factor
```{r}
posthoc_resultaten <- list()

for (f in factoren) {
  cat("\n", strrep("=", 60), "\n")
  cat("Post-hoc:", f, "\n")
  cat(strrep("=", 60), "\n")

  model_f <- clmm_resultaten[[f]]

  emm_model <- emmeans(model_f, ~ model, mode = "latent")
  cat("\n-- Model --\n")
  print(pairs(emm_model, adjust = "bonferroni"))

  emm_methode <- emmeans(model_f, ~ methode, mode = "latent")
  cat("\n-- Methode --\n")
  print(pairs(emm_methode, adjust = "bonferroni"))

  posthoc_resultaten[[f]] <- list(model = emm_model, methode = emm_methode)
}
```

## Post-hoc cumulative
```{r}
em_model <- emmeans(model_totaal_lmm, pairwise ~ model, adjust = "bonferroni")
print(em_model$emmeans)
print(em_model$contrasts)

em_methode <- emmeans(model_totaal_lmm, pairwise ~ methode, adjust = "bonferroni")
print(em_methode$emmeans)
print(em_methode$contrasts)
```
